title: DigitalOcean Nonprofit Credits
description: Free $2,000/year cloud computing credits for registered nonprofits. Perfect for hosting your Nanoclaw instance.

title: Microsoft Azure Nonprofit
description: Up to $2,000 in annual Azure credits for qualified nonprofits. Requires application and verification.

title: Azure Free Trial
description: Instant $200 credit for 30 days — no nonprofit status needed. Great for testing your first VPS.

title: Claude by Anthropic
description: The recommended AI model for ChabadLabs. Powerful reasoning, excellent at coding, and built with safety in mind.

title: Nanoclaw
description: Secure sandboxed AI agent platform. Each chat runs in its own Docker container — no data leaks, no prompt injection.

title: AccuFlow
description: Task and calendar management that integrates beautifully with your Nanoclaw AI assistant for daily summaries.

title: Claude Code
description: Anthropic's command-line AI coding assistant. Build and deploy from your terminal with natural language.

title: TailScale
description: Free secure VPN connecting your machines. Essential for safe remote access to your VPS. Free for personal use.

title: What is Claude? A Beginner's Guide
description: Plain-language introduction to AI for shluchim who are just getting started. No technical background needed.

title: Prompt Engineering Basics
description: How to communicate with AI effectively. Patterns, examples, and templates for shluchim.

title: Building Your First Nanoclaw Skill
description: Step-by-step guide to creating a custom AI skill. From concept to deployment on your instance.

title: VPS Security Essentials
description: SSH keys, firewalls, fail2ban, and TailScale. Lock down your server before deploying anything.
